title: Horror: Perfected
description: Horror: Perfected aims to increase the overall uneasiness of minecraft to make it a more tense and unsettling experience.
body:
# Please read the description for some important notes about the pack!

# All credit to the original mod authors for all of the mods! I couldn't do it without them!

This modpack is best enjoyed with friends, but offers a challenging and enjoyable singleplayer experience as well. Local voice chat and radios allow for in-game communication over long distances, but it will require some set-up. A multiplayer revival system exists, which allows you to save your friends amidst challenging battles, but will be disabled in singleplayer. (recommend enabling "instant respawn")

Horror Perfected aims to create an uneasy, visceral, and uncomfortable experience in comparison to vanilla minecraft.

Littered with grotesque monsters and guttural wails and screams from various beasts and monsters, the goal of the modpack is to bring you no comfort throughout your time in the world of minecraft.

Aside from plenty of changes to mobs on the whole, you will also be immersed in the world by making it more realistic. Some highlighted features include:



- Increased texture resolution on blocks and mobs with gritty textures aimed at semi-realism (Patrix 32x and some "realistic mobs" resourcepacks)
- Enhanced graphics and dynamic lighting
- True Darkness mod and a custom datapack to make darkness a constant factor, contributing to both difficulty and horror. Beware the oceans.
- Nights can be accelerated by sleeping, but not skipped entirely. Be careful how many days you pass, who knows when the next horror will emerge?
- 2 "infection" mods aimed to create a constant, growing threat at all stages of the game. It will feel like you can never truly cleanse the world of impurity. Can you push back the growing tides of horrific monsters?
- Random events to create pressure on you no matter where you go. You'll be under constant threat from every manner of monster.
- Many more mods for optimization and enhancing realism, engrossing the player in the environment as much as possible was a massive goal for this modpack.

Combat is going to be more challenging than your vanilla minecraft experience. Mobs are smarter and use their equipment to greater effect. Additionally, some mobs can break blocks, so no home is ever totally safe.


Good luck! Fight to survive more than 100 days, but beware what the hundredth day may bring into your world- that is- if you don't release it yourself first.
